> **⚠️ For vulnerabilities that could be actively exploited, please email security@ztlp.org instead of filing a public issue.**

## Component
- [ ] Cryptographic implementation
- [ ] Protocol design / spec
- [ ] Handshake / key exchange
- [ ] Relay / forwarding
- [ ] Namespace (ZTLP-NS)
- [ ] Gateway
- [ ] Other
